title: pteris arguta var. tremula
intro: Pteris arguta var. tremula, also known as the tremulous lace fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique characteristics. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to clear heat and relieve inflammation. The health benefits of Pteris arguta var. tremula include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used in tea form or as a dried extract, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
